About Organization

The Madhya Pradesh Employee Selection Board (MPESB) is a government organization responsible for conducting recruitment exams for various government jobs in Madhya Pradesh.

The organization aims to provide employment opportunities to eligible candidates in the state.

About the Programme

The MPESB ITI Training Officer Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for ITI training officers in Madhya Pradesh.

The program aims to provide employment opportunities to eligible candidates in the state.
